releaseNotes:
# Compass Partner — Release Notes

_Date: 2026-03-20_

---

### What's New

#### Microsoft 365 Integration
- Connect your **OneDrive and SharePoint** to Compass Partner — browse, search, and use your Microsoft 365 files directly in conversations.

#### Terminal Launcher
- Launch a terminal pre-loaded with the Nova CLI directly from the app with **nova -c** integration, on both Windows and macOS.

#### Collapsible Tool Call Details
- AI tool calls in chat now show **human-friendly titles** and can be **expanded or collapsed** so you can inspect details without cluttering your conversation.

#### Scheduler Panel Improvements
- The scheduler dashboard now **auto-refreshes** when you switch to it and supports manual refresh via a new IPC channel.

#### Sleep/Wake Reconnection
- The WebSocket connection now **automatically recovers** after your machine wakes from sleep, so you never have to manually reconnect.

#### macOS Titlebar
- The app now renders a **native draggable titlebar region** on macOS for a more polished feel.

#### Branded File-Type Icons
- Files in the Knowledge panel now display **branded icons** per file type, and markdown content renders with full formatting.

---

### Improvements

- **Rebranded** from "Compass Desktop" to **Compass Partner**.
- Chat streaming is smoother — live markdown rendering and a blinking cursor while Nova types.
- Chat context menu lets you **manage workspaces** directly from a right-click.
- The **model switcher UI** has been redesigned for clarity.
- Settings navigation has been relocated for better discoverability.
- The system tray is now **always-on**, keeping Compass Partner accessible at all times.
- ACP (Agent Client Protocol) reconnects automatically after plugin changes.
- Disabled MCP tools are **excluded from the badge count** so the indicator is more accurate.
- The onboarding flow now checks for **Nova CLI updates** before you start.
- Smooth scrolling rolled out across the chat panel.
- Chat virtualisation and batched streaming for noticeably better performance on long conversations.

---

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed **Node.js detection on macOS** when the app is launched from the Dock or Finder.
- Fixed dark mode colour issues in the **Marketplace content preview**.
- Fixed a crash (`WASM out-of-bounds`) triggered by running `/clear` in chat.
- Fixed the Compass side panel staying open when **switching projects**.
- Fixed ACP session update filtering, plan rendering, and error handling edge cases.
- Fixed the settings **save button flashing** unexpectedly.
- Fixed in-flight ACP prompts not being cancelled when the chat is cleared.
- Fixed the scheduler history not refreshing when switching tabs.
- Fixed an issue where ACP did not reconnect when tool configuration changed.
- Enforced local approval setting for **remote CLI commands** (security fix).

---

### Under the Hood

- Introduced a **clean uninstall and data cleanup** system — uninstalling leaves no orphaned data behind.
- Safe IPC send helpers prevent renderer crashes when windows are closing.
- Chat rendering migrated to a **virtualised list** for lower memory usage.
- ACP wire format normalised for more reliable session handling.

---

_Co-authored by [Nova](https://www.compassap.ai/portfolio/nova.html)_
